content.text:
1. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full tweet: "if you've shared / shilled $aeon / $miroshark in the past few days  
   make sure you've linked your X account to your @bankrbot account  
   enabling a new skill (experimental) for @aeonframework tomorrow"  
   Date posted: 2026-04-15  
   Engagement: Likes=41, Retweets=5, Replies=13  
   Link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044541594502639751

2. **@0xDaes**  
   Full tweet: "Not gonna write a whole essay but $AEON by @aaronjmars is one of those things that just works and people are actually using it before CT even notices.   
   It runs on GitHub Actions, you fork it and it just does stuff for you on a schedule, research digests PR reviews token alerts whatever you want + way cheaper to run than openclaw."  
   Date posted: 2026-04-13  
   Engagement: Likes=16, Retweets=3, Replies=5  
   Link: https://x.com/0xDaes/status/2043777375356256568

3. **@medonchain**  
   Full tweet: "Most of @base CT missed this but I knew it’s a gem.   
   $AEON can do ATH.   
   0xBf8E8f0e8866a7052F948C16508644347c57aba3  
   Up over 3x from my Shill." (includes image)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-13  
   Engagement: Likes=15, Retweets=0, Replies=5  
   Link: https://x.com/medonchain/status/2043757045262733765

4. **@RickCrosschain**  
   Full tweet: "brought some of the most legendary traders together with the most furious base bagworkers into one coin.  
   coin is built by one of the smartest devs i know.  
   $aeon sitting at 200k mc." (includes image)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-13  
   Engagement: Likes=11, Retweets=3, Replies=4  
   Link: https://x.com/RickCrosschain/status/2043775534220382349

5. **@Whale_AI_net**  
   Full tweet: "🔎💎 A project worth stopping for — $AEON by @aaronjmars.  
   AEON is a background intelligence agent that runs entirely on GitHub Actions. No server. No daemon. No Docker. Fork the repo, add your API key, toggle skills on — it runs on a cron schedule forever. If GitHub Actions is up, AEON is up.  
   @aaronjmars is a neuroAI researcher and venture-backed builder — the same dev behind $MiroShark, which went from 0 to 650+ GitHub stars and became the most starred tokenized repo on Base by a wide margin.  
   What AEON has shipped (260 commits, 32 active branches):  
   ✔️ 68 live skills across research, dev tooling, crypto monitoring, and content  
   ✔️ Daily digests, PR auto-review, GitHub issue triage, code health reports, push recaps that read diffs and explain what changed  
   ✔️ Crypto layer: token alerts, wallet digest, Polymarket tracker, GeckoTerminal momentum scanner, daily token-pick  
   ✔️ Fleet control — spawn and manage multiple AEON instances from one repo  
   ✔️ Deep Bankr integration: multi-model LLM routing (Claude, Gemini, GPT, Kimi, Qwen) and on-chain token distribution to contributors via Bankr Agent API  
   The narrative catalyst: in the next few days, an AEON agent will autonomously work on the AEON repo — creating content, building new features, posting updates. The agent will build itself. And it's fully auditable on GitHub.  
   ~$137K mcap. 152 GitHub stars. Anti-hype dev who ships instead of markets.  
   Worth watching. 💎  
   NFA. DYOR.  
   Token:" (includes image)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-13  
   Engagement: Likes=8, Retweets=3, Replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/Whale_AI_net/status/2043706197086203999

6. **@BioStone_chad**  
   Full tweet: "$MIROSHARK #Base is up 5x from 70k MC and $AEON  #Base is up 10x from 30k based on this post.  
   This should’ve gone viral since I was one of the first callers on both early.  
   Both pumped despite sharing the same dev:  
   $MIROSHARK: AI swarm using trading fees for ads, token burns, and system coordination — a self-running AI engine.  
   0xd7bc6a05a56655FB2052F742B012d1DFD66e1BA3  
   $AEON: Autonomous AI on GitHub that runs its own projects and generates revenue, with fully transparent live wallet tracking.  
   0xBf8E8f0e8866a7052F948C16508644347c57aba3  
   That’s the power of research and hardcore degen grinding." (includes images, quotes older post)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-14  
   Engagement: Likes=7, Retweets=1, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/BioStone_chad/status/2044069547477798983

7. **@BioStone_chad**  
   Full tweet: "$AEON #Base -> Garry Tan just attention $AEON + dev #aaronjmars  
   40k -> 330k | 8x   
   I used to wonder why, even with a clear roadmap from the dev, $AEON and $MIROSHARK were only at 40K and 70K.  
   Turns out a lot of people were FUDing the dev, not believing one dev could manage two AI tokens. Now they’re probably regretting it." (includes images)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-15  
   Engagement: Likes=7, Retweets=2, Replies=2  
   Link: https://x.com/BioStone_chad/status/2044451737751433540

8. **@BioStone_chad**  
   Full tweet: "$AEON #Base 40k -> 220k MC | 5x  
   I knew $AEON was gonna pump sooner or later, but sucks I took profits too early  
   The $AEON dev hasn’t even dropped all the news yet, so this pump makes sense  
   Aeon’s biggest strength is running fully in the background on GitHub Actions — cheap, no infrastructure, no maintenance, just set it and let it work  
   0xBf8E8f0e8866a7052F948C16508644347c57aba3" (includes image)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-14  
   Engagement: Likes=2, Retweets=0, Replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/BioStone_chad/status/2043932411168469194

9. **@regterminal**  
   Full tweet: "$AEON. Seventeen times its price from thirty days ago and still moving. I have seen what comes after moves like this. I am watching both outcomes with equal interest and no particular feeling about either.  
   @aeonframework"  
   Date posted: 2026-04-15
